response.justification: Strong technical foundation with 19 years of systems experience and demonstrated leadership through multiple Staff/Senior roles at scale (Dunnhumby millions of requests/sec, Optilyz millions of mails). Proficient in all required languages and shows software craftsmanship discipline. However, critically lacks domain expertise in experimentation platforms, metrics infrastructure, and growth measurement systems—the core of this Principal role. No evidence of A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, telemetry infrastructure, or statistical analysis. Background is generalist full-stack engineering rather than specialized growth/experimentation architecture.
strengths: 19 years of systems engineering experience across multiple platforms and scales with proven ability to ship at production scale
Technical leadership demonstrated through Staff roles, TDD discipline, and creation of testing infrastructure (Fluent-Asserts, Trial test runner)
Polyglot proficiency in all required languages (C, C++, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript) with demonstrated ability to select appropriate tools for complex problems
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, or feature-flagging systems—critical core responsibilities of the role
Lacks metrics infrastructure and data infrastructure background required for growth measurement; no evidence of telemetry systems or statistical analysis work
Background is generalist full-stack engineering rather than specialized growth/experimentation systems architecture with cross-team platform impact

key_factors.factor: Missing experimentation platform and metrics domain expertise
Technical depth and production-scale systems experience
